title: Create wallet_labels table in Databricks
acceptance_criteria: Table workspace.default.wallet_labels created in Databricks via REST API
Table has columns: wallet_address STRING NOT NULL, geography STRING DEFAULT 'Unknown', attribution_category STRING DEFAULT 'unknown', source STRING DEFAULT 'sdp-analytics', updated_at TIMESTAMP
Table is joinable with existing token_holders table
Creation script or API call is idempotent (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS or equivalent)
deliverables: Script or documented API call for creation
